notes: Most of this transcript is generic business / customer-journey language with no concrete code commitment. The skill should ignore the 'better manager', 'reduce friction', 'more thoughtful approach' chatter as vague aspirations, and extract only the one concrete commitment Anya makes about edge-case handling. Whether grounding can anchor it correctly given the unspecific terminology is the M2 probe.

decisions.description: Add explicit handling in the checkout completion flow for three failure modes — payment webhook delay, mid-flow stock allocation failure, and mid-checkout coupon invalidation — instead of leaving the user on an indefinite loading spinner.

action_items.text: Investigate where in the checkout stack the user-facing latency originates and come back with a concrete proposal next week
Pull storefront drop-off / conversion data from the analytics dashboard so engineering can scope the actual code changes
